tags.name: Enfield Falls Canal
tags.note: The alt_name "Windsor Locks Canal" is technically a misnomer. Windsor Locks is named after the canal (or rather its locks), not the other way around.

tags.name: Enfield Falls Canal
tags.note: Sometimes erroneously called the Windsor Locks Canal. Windsor Locks is named for the canal (or rather its locks), not the other way around.
